response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015 plus a university thesis, far short of the 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ required. His recent decade is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms. He has no Fixed Income or capital-markets domain experience (RIDE Capital was a Node/GraphQL fintech, not investment banking), and no stated SQL Server or Oracle background. Desirable extras like CI/CD, scripting, and some Java exist, but the core mandatory skills are absent.
strengths: Broad, senior full-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Proven low-latency systems work (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby) showing performance-engineering aptitude
Strong craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, open-source authorship, and teaching/mentoring
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ (2014-2015), versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No Fixed Income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain experience
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB

key_factors.factor: No fixed-income or capital-markets domain knowledge
Strong general engineering fundamentals and performance work
